atomicSubtasks.name: Search candidate by name
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve a list of candidates matching a given name (and optional recruitment name)

requiredInputs.name: CandidateName
requiredInputs.description: Tên ứng viên cần tìm

optionalInputs.name: RecruitmentName
optionalInputs.description: Tên tin tuyển dụng (nếu muốn lọc)

assertionCriteria: Danh sách trả về chứa ít nhất một ứng viên có tên khớp
Mỗi mục trong danh sách có CandidateID và CandidateName

atomicSubtasks.name: Evaluate fit score for multiple candidates
atomicSubtasks.description: Calculate suitability scores for a set of candidates against a specific recruitment posting

requiredInputs.name: CandidateIDs
requiredInputs.description: Danh sách ID ứng viên, ngăn cách bằng dấu phẩy

requiredInputs.name: RecruitmentID
requiredInputs.description: ID của tin tuyển dụng

assertionCriteria: Kết quả trả về có trường Candidates chứa danh sách các ứng viên
Mỗi ứng viên có trường fit score (được tính trong nội dung trả về)

atomicSubtasks.name: Evaluate fit score for a single candidate
atomicSubtasks.description: Calculate suitability score for one candidate against a recruitment posting

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên

requiredInputs.name: RecruitmentID
requiredInputs.description: ID của tin tuyển dụng

assertionCriteria: Kết quả trả về chứa thông tin CandidateName và fit score
RecruitmentID trong kết quả khớp với giá trị đầu vào

atomicSubtasks.name: Search candidates via natural language query
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve candidates and recruitment info based on a free‑text query

requiredInputs.name: Query
requiredInputs.description: Câu truy vấn ngôn ngữ tự nhiên mô tả tiêu chí
sampleValues: Ứng viên đang ở vòng phỏng vấn cho tin QC‑T1‑2026
Các ứng viên có kinh nghiệm Java 3 năm

assertionCriteria: Kết quả trả về có trường Candidates với ít nhất một ứng viên
RecruitmentID và RecruitmentName được trả về cùng với danh sách

atomicSubtasks.name: Fetch email template details
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve the content and metadata of an email template for editing or reuse

requiredInputs.name: EmailID
requiredInputs.description: ID của mẫu email cần lấy

assertionCriteria: Kết quả trả về chứa EmailContent có placeholder ##Value##
EmailTemplateName và TitleEmail được trả về

atomicSubtasks.name: Generate new recruitment email
atomicSubtasks.description: Create a fresh email content based on a selected template and supplied field values

requiredInputs.name: EmailID
requiredInputs.description: ID của mẫu email gốc

requiredInputs.name: FieldValues
requiredInputs.description: Map các trường trộn (FieldKey) sang giá trị thực tế

assertionCriteria: EmailContent trong kết quả không còn placeholder ##Value##
Các giá trị thay thế xuất hiện đúng vị trí trong nội dung

atomicSubtasks.name: Suggest interview questions
atomicSubtasks.description: Provide a list of interview questions based on user‑specified criteria
atomicSubtasks.skillRef: Gợi ý câu hỏi phỏng vấn

requiredInputs.name: Topic
requiredInputs.description: Chủ đề hoặc vị trí công việc

requiredInputs.name: Level
requiredInputs.description: Mức độ khó (beginner, intermediate, senior)

assertionCriteria: Kết quả trả về là danh sách ít nhất 3 câu hỏi
Mỗi câu hỏi liên quan tới Topic và phù hợp với Level

atomicSubtasks.name: Print interview questions
atomicSubtasks.description: Send the generated interview questions to a printer or export as PDF
atomicSubtasks.skillRef: Function Calling - In câu hỏi phỏng vấn

requiredInputs.name: QuestionList
requiredInputs.description: Danh sách câu hỏi cần in

assertionCriteria: In thành công và trả về thông báo xác nhận
File PDF được tạo nếu Format=pdf

atomicSubtasks.name: Save email template
atomicSubtasks.description: Persist a newly created or edited email template into the recruitment system
atomicSubtasks.skillRef: Function Calling - Lưu mẫu email tuyển dụng

requiredInputs.name: EmailContent
requiredInputs.description: Nội dung email đã hoàn thiện
sampleValues: Kính gửi Nguyễn Văn A, chúng tôi mời bạn tham gia phỏng vấn...

requiredInputs.name: TemplateName
requiredInputs.description: Tên mẫu email
sampleValues: Mời phỏng vấn - Kỹ sư phần mềm

requiredInputs.name: EmailType
requiredInputs.description: Loại email theo hệ thống (0=Other,1=Xác nhận,5=Loại ứng viên,18=Mời thi,54=Mời ứng tuyển lại)

optionalInputs.name: TitleEmail
sampleValues: Mời tham gia phỏng vấn vị trí Kỹ sư phần mềm

assertionCriteria: Trả về ID mới của mẫu email đã lưu
Thông báo lưu thành công được hiển thị

atomicSubtasks.name: Summarize CV
atomicSubtasks.description: Generate a concise summary of a candidate's CV based on user‑specified focus

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên

requiredInputs.name: FocusArea
requiredInputs.description: Mục tiêu tóm tắt (ví dụ: kinh nghiệm, kỹ năng, dự án)

optionalInputs.name: Length
optionalInputs.description: Số câu muốn trong bản tóm tắt

assertionCriteria: Bản tóm tắt ngắn gọn, không vượt quá Length câu
Bao gồm thông tin về FocusArea

atomicSubtasks.name: Translate CV
atomicSubtasks.description: Translate a candidate's CV into a target language

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên

requiredInputs.name: TargetLanguage
requiredInputs.description: Ngôn ngữ đích (ISO code hoặc tên)

assertionCriteria: Kết quả trả về là nội dung CV bằng TargetLanguage
Không có ký tự lạ hoặc mất dữ liệu

atomicSubtasks.name: Use existing email template content
atomicSubtasks.description: Insert a saved email template's content into a new email composition flow
atomicSubtasks.skillRef: Function Calling - Dùng nội dung mẫu email

requiredInputs.name: EmailID
requiredInputs.description: ID của mẫu email muốn dùng

assertionCriteria: Nội dung mẫu email được chèn vào khung soạn email
Placeholder vẫn còn nếu chưa được thay thế

atomicSubtasks.name: Answer report‑related question
atomicSubtasks.description: Provide answers to user queries about recruitment reports using multiple reporting tools

requiredInputs.name: Query
requiredInputs.description: Câu hỏi người dùng về báo cáo
sampleValues: Số lượng ứng viên đã nộp hồ sơ trong tháng 3
Tỷ lệ chuyển đổi từ CV sang phỏng vấn

assertionCriteria: Câu trả lời chứa số liệu hoặc biểu đồ phù hợp
Nếu có yêu cầu xuất file, trả về link tải

atomicSubtasks.name: Answer interview schedule question
atomicSubtasks.description: Provide information about interview dates, times, and locations

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên cần tra lịch

optionalInputs.name: Date
optionalInputs.description: Ngày cụ thể muốn kiểm tra (nếu có)

assertionCriteria: Trả về thời gian và địa điểm phỏng vấn cho CandidateID
Nếu không có lịch, thông báo rõ ràng

atomicSubtasks.name: View candidate CV content
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve the full CV text of a candidate for review

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên

assertionCriteria: Nội dung CV được trả về đầy đủ, định dạng văn bản
Không có lỗi truy xuất

atomicSubtasks.name: Generate interview questions
atomicSubtasks.description: Generate primary and secondary interview questions for a specific candidate and recruitment posting

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: Unique identifier of the candidate

requiredInputs.name: RecruitmentID
requiredInputs.description: Identifier of the recruitment posting the candidate applied to

assertionCriteria: Agent returns a list of primary interview questions
Agent returns a list of secondary (follow‑up) interview questions
Each question reflects the candidate persona and job requirements

atomicSubtasks.name: Summarize CV (by ID)
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve a candidate's CV content and produce a concise summary based on user request

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: Unique identifier of the candidate whose CV will be summarized

assertionCriteria: Agent returns a short paragraph summarizing the candidate's experience and skills
Summary references key achievements from the CV
Length of summary is within 3‑5 sentences

atomicSubtasks.name: Summarize CV (by name)
atomicSubtasks.description: Search for a candidate by name (and optional recruitment) then summarize their CV

requiredInputs.name: CandidateName
requiredInputs.description: Full or partial name of the candidate

optionalInputs.name: RecruitmentName
optionalInputs.description: Title of the recruitment posting to narrow the search

assertionCriteria: Agent selects the correct candidate from the list
Returned summary reflects the selected candidate's CV
If multiple matches, agent asks clarification before summarizing

atomicSubtasks.name: Translate CV (by ID)
atomicSubtasks.description: Fetch a candidate's CV and translate it into the target language specified by the user

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: Identifier of the candidate whose CV will be translated

requiredInputs.name: TargetLanguage
requiredInputs.description: ISO code or name of the language to translate the CV into

assertionCriteria: Translated CV text is returned in the requested language
Formatting of sections (Education, Experience, etc.) is preserved
No original Vietnamese content remains in the output

atomicSubtasks.name: Translate CV (by name)
atomicSubtasks.description: Locate a candidate by name (optional recruitment) and translate their CV into a target language

requiredInputs.name: CandidateName
requiredInputs.description: Name of the candidate whose CV will be translated

requiredInputs.name: TargetLanguage
requiredInputs.description: Language to translate the CV into

optionalInputs.name: RecruitmentName
optionalInputs.description: Recruitment posting title to narrow candidate search

assertionCriteria: Agent confirms the correct candidate before translation
Returned text is fully translated into the target language
If multiple candidates match, agent asks for clarification

atomicSubtasks.name: List candidates
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve a list of candidates filtered by name and optionally by recruitment posting

requiredInputs.name: CandidateName
requiredInputs.description: Name or partial name to search for

optionalInputs.name: RecruitmentName
optionalInputs.description: Recruitment posting title to further filter results

assertionCriteria: Agent returns an array of candidate records
Each record includes CandidateID, CandidateName, RecruitmentName, TitleWebsite, ApplyDate, and Position
Results are limited to matches for the provided name (and recruitment if given)

atomicSubtasks.name: Retrieve Recruitment Posting by Name
atomicSubtasks.description: Fetch details of a recruitment posting given its internal title

requiredInputs.name: RecruitmentName
requiredInputs.description: Internal title of the recruitment posting
sampleValues: Tuyển dụng Kỹ sư phần mềm
Mở vị trí Chuyên viên Marketing

assertionCriteria: The returned payload includes RecruitmentID and JobPostitionName
The response status is successful and contains a non‑empty array

atomicSubtasks.name: Compare Recruitment Metrics Between Two Periods
atomicSubtasks.description: Generate a side‑by‑side comparison of recruitment statistics for two date ranges

requiredInputs.name: FromDate1
requiredInputs.description: Start date of the first reporting period (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

requiredInputs.name: ToDate1
requiredInputs.description: End date of the first reporting period (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

requiredInputs.name: FromDate2
requiredInputs.description: Start date of the second reporting period (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

requiredInputs.name: ToDate2
requiredInputs.description: End date of the second reporting period (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

assertionCriteria: Output contains Period1 and Period2 objects with TotalNeeded, TotalCVApplied, TotalHired, and CompletionRate
Numeric values are present for each metric in both periods

atomicSubtasks.name: Report Candidate Applications Over Time
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve number of candidates applied per day for a specific recruitment posting

requiredInputs.name: RecruitmentID
requiredInputs.description: Unique identifier of the recruitment posting

requiredInputs.name: FromDate
requiredInputs.description: Start date for the candidate report (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

requiredInputs.name: ToDate
requiredInputs.description: End date for the candidate report (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

assertionCriteria: Payload is an array where each element has Date and Total fields
Total is a non‑negative integer for each date

atomicSubtasks.name: Get Overview of a Specific Recruitment Posting
atomicSubtasks.description: Fetch detailed recruitment metrics for a single posting, including rounds, efficiency, evaluation, cost, and channels

requiredInputs.name: RecruitmentID
requiredInputs.description: ID of the recruitment posting to overview

assertionCriteria: Output contains arrays RecruitmentRound, RecruitmentEfficiency, RecruitmentEvaluation, RecruitmentChannel, etc.
Each array includes the fields described in the tool definition (e.g., RoundName, Quantity, Percent)

atomicSubtasks.name: Company‑wide Recruitment Overview
atomicSubtasks.description: Generate a summary report of recruitment activity across the whole company for a given period

requiredInputs.name: FromDate
requiredInputs.description: Start date of the reporting period (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

requiredInputs.name: ToDate
requiredInputs.description: End date of the reporting period (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

assertionCriteria: Summary object includes TotalCVApplied, TotalPositions, TotalHired, TotalNeeded, CompletionRate
Deficit and FewApplication arrays are present when applicable

atomicSubtasks.name: Recruitment Report by Department
atomicSubtasks.description: Provide recruitment statistics for a specific department within a date range

requiredInputs.name: FromDate
requiredInputs.description: Start date for the department report (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

requiredInputs.name: ToDate
requiredInputs.description: End date for the department report (YYYY‑MM‑DD)

requiredInputs.name: DepartmentName
requiredInputs.description: Name of the department (e.g., IT, Marketing)

assertionCriteria: Payload contains Summary with DepartmentName and TotalNeeded fields
Numeric totals are non‑negative and match the requested period

atomicSubtasks.name: Get recruitment report by job position
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve a recruitment status report for a specific job position within a date range

requiredInputs.name: JobPositionName
requiredInputs.description: Tên vị trí tuyển dụng

requiredInputs.name: FromDate
requiredInputs.description: Thời điểm bắt đầu kỳ báo cáo (YYYY-MM-DD)

requiredInputs.name: ToDate
requiredInputs.description: Thời điểm kết thúc kỳ báo cáo (YYYY-MM-DD)

assertionCriteria: Response contains a 'payload' object with a 'Summary' field
Summary includes the same JobPositionName as requested
Numbers for TotalNeeded, TotalHired, and CompletionRate are present and non‑negative

atomicSubtasks.name: List interview schedules
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve a list of interview schedules filtered by date range, type and scope

requiredInputs.name: FromDate
requiredInputs.description: Thời gian bắt đầu (YYYY-MM-DD)

requiredInputs.name: ToDate
requiredInputs.description: Thời gian kết thúc (YYYY-MM-DD)

requiredInputs.name: ScheduleType
requiredInputs.description: Loại lịch phỏng vấn (1=trực tiếp, 2=bài thi, 4=online, …)

requiredInputs.name: Scope
requiredInputs.description: Phạm vi xem lịch (1=đã tạo, 2=tham gia, 3=cả hai, 4=toàn công ty)

assertionCriteria: Response contains a 'payload.Data' array
Each item includes CandidateID, CandidateName, JobPositionName, StartTime and EndTime
Total number of records matches the 'payload.Total' field

atomicSubtasks.name: View interview board members
atomicSubtasks.description: Get the list of interview board members for a specific interview schedule

requiredInputs.name: CandidateScheduleID
requiredInputs.description: ID của lịch phỏng vấn

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên

assertionCriteria: Response includes a 'payload' array of board members
Each member has UserID, FullName and ContactEmail
IsCreatedSchedule flag is a boolean

atomicSubtasks.name: Get candidate CV content
atomicSubtasks.description: Retrieve the raw CV file content of a specific candidate

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên

assertionCriteria: Response payload is a non‑empty string
String appears to be plain text or base64‑encoded PDF content
Content length is greater than 100 characters

atomicSubtasks.name: Summarize candidate CV
atomicSubtasks.description: Generate a concise summary of a candidate's CV after retrieving its content

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên

assertionCriteria: LLM returns a paragraph (50‑150 words) summarizing education, experience and skills
Summary mentions the candidate's name and applied position
No raw CV markup appears in the output

atomicSubtasks.name: Translate candidate CV
atomicSubtasks.description: Translate the retrieved CV content into a target language

requiredInputs.name: CandidateID
requiredInputs.description: ID của ứng viên

requiredInputs.name: TargetLanguage
requiredInputs.description: Ngôn ngữ đích (ISO code)

assertionCriteria: LLM returns translated text in the requested language
Translation preserves the structure of sections (Education, Experience, etc.)
Output length is comparable to original CV content
